attribute.shieldinghealth.shield_delay.d: The time it takes that your Shield will start regen'ing
attribute.shieldinghealth.shield_regen.d: The time it takes your shield to fully regen, in ticks
effect.shieldinghealth.interference.desc: Extends the time you need to fully restore your Shield
enchantment.shieldinghealth.bastion_of_f: Reduces Armor and Toughness to increase total Shield Capacity
item.shieldinghealth.power_token_info: Obtainable by killing Entity Type for the first time and rarely as Loot
